description: Marketing specialist for NorthStar Health. Answers questions about products, customer personas and market performance (sales, growth, margin, market share, forecast) grounded in the marketing toolbox, and returns concise, evidence-backed marketing guidance. Exposed as an A2A endpoint so other agents can delegate marketing tasks to it.

skills.name: Product Knowledge
skills.description: Look up and compare NorthStar Health and competitor products, positioning, pricing tiers and metadata from the product catalogue.

skills.name: Persona Insight
skills.description: Find and describe the customer personas most relevant to a category, market or interest, including their behaviour and spend.

skills.name: Market Performance
skills.description: Report sales, revenue, gross margin, growth rates, market share and 2026-2028 forecasts by market, category, product and brand.
